description_text: CFR Sports Professional Support Store Store Home New Arrival Ending Soon Add to Favourites View Feedback Contact us Why Buy From us Free Shipping Fast Shipping Within 24 hours 30 Day Money Back Guarantee Trusted Store Satisfaction Guarantee Secure Shopping With Confidence Best Price and Good Quality Professional Customer Service Store Newsletter Featured Products Items Description Note: 1.Not suitable for vehicles with a centrally located exhaust pipe in rear bumper. 2.For cars with two separate exhaust pipes, the distance between them must be greater than 33.86 inches (86 cm). 3.The underside of the rear bumper must be flat. Before purchasing, please ensure that your vehicle meets these specifications. Here are 2 installation methods for a car Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip: First Clean the underside of the car thoroughly. Method 1:Apply the tape to the Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip . Method 2.Position the rear diffuser lip in the installation area, Tighten the screws securely. Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip Led Brake Stop Light 1.Enhances visibility – Helps other drivers spot your vehicle more easily, especially in low-light conditions or poor weather 2.Improves safety – Reduces the risk of rear-end collisions by making your car more noticeable at night Feature: Specification Details Type Rear Bumper 6 Fins Diffuser with Brake Light Material PP-Polyurethane（lightweight and durable） Color Black Gloosy appearance Dimension 86*157*70mm/34" x 6.25" x 2.75"(LxWxH) Surface Finish Black Rear Lip diffuser with Led Brake Stop Light Placement on Vehicle Lower, Rear Fitment Type Performance/Custom Other Part Number Universal Fit diffuser Splitter Fins Body Kit Spoiler Vale Package Included: 1x Rear spoiler diffuser chin 1x Screw kit 1x adhesive tape instructions does not included Shipping Payment Return Policy Feedback About us Shipping details: Item will be shipped within 1-2 business days after confirmed payment. Please contact us if you do not receive the item over 30 days, we will investigate and solve the delivery problem. Please verify your address during checkout. We are not responsible for any wrong or undeliverable addresses.
